subcodes.title: Words to Habib Mu'ayyad around Dec. 1907
subcodes.first_line: All of these were the dwelling-places of the Prophets of old. All of them were blessed by the footsteps of the Divine Manifestations
subcodes.first_line_orig: تمامش مسکن و ماوای انبیاء است تمامش موطی اقدام انبیاءاست انبیاء الهی شبها تا صبح بمناجات
subcodes.subjects: @Shrines and Holy places, @prophecy and fulfillment, @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @future of Haifa; of the Holy Land
